subcommands.name: deploy
subcommands.description: deploy local migrations and metadata changes to Nhost production

subcommands.name: dev
subcommands.description: start Nhost project for local development

subcommands.name: down
subcommands.description: stop and remove local Nhost backend started by `nhost dev`

subcommands.name: env:pull
subcommands.description: sync remote environment variables to your local environment

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: initialize current working directory as a Nhost project
